purpose: Close out the state-authority hardening plan by consolidating operator-facing provenance visibility, runbook guidance, and acceptance evidence.
design_intent: Ensure operators can explain effective control values and scheduler adaptation rationale from APIs, UI, and runbooks without code inspection.
change_impact: Updates planning/operations documentation and completion trackers; no runtime contract behavior is changed.

in: Map SG-001 through SG-005 success criteria to concrete implementation evidence
Consolidate provenance and scheduler diagnostics operator runbook steps
Finalize closeout tracker state and planning hardcopy snapshot
out: Changing persistence topology or scheduler adaptation algorithms
Altering fail-closed publisher submit/redirect verification semantics

acceptance_checklist.name: Durable control persistence
evidence: lib/runtimeControls.ts serialized atomic write queue and temp-write rename path
server.ts control-panel mutation handlers return persistence failures explicitly

acceptance_checklist.name: State version convergence
evidence: server.ts control panel responses include stateVersion and persistedAt
server.ts stale write protection via expectedVersion
src/hooks/controlPanelSync.ts stale-response suppression by state version

acceptance_checklist.name: Frontend stale-response immunity
evidence: src/hooks/controlPanelSync.ts ordering guard and equal-version response handling
tests/integration/api.integration.test.ts conflict and authoritative response assertions

acceptance_checklist.name: Opportunity-capture scheduler behavior
evidence: lib/schedulerSignals.ts isolated opportunity signal windows excluding recheck-only cadence
scripts/scheduler_signal_replay.ts deterministic replay and calibration report outputs
ops/systemd/scheduler-replay-report.sh operator command path for timestamped calibration runs

acceptance_checklist.name: Operational explainability
evidence: GET /api/control-panel includes gap source + state metadata for provenance
GET /api/trend-insights and GET /api/scheduler-signals expose adaptation reasoning and calibration metrics
README.md and ops/systemd/README.md operator steps for provenance and scheduler diagnostics

archive_actions.notes: P5 closeout artifacts prepared; optional post-closeout enhancements stay out of acceptance gate.
